[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0010100100 3
2 0011010000 3
3 0100001001 3
4 0000000100 1
5 0011000000 2
6 0000001000 1
7 0001001001 3

01 10 0010011000 3
12 21 0010001001 3
23 32 0010100100 3 match 1
34 43 0010000000 1
45 54 0001000000 1
56 65 0101001001 4
67 76 0001000001 2
70 07 0010100000 2

02 20 0010101100 4
13 31 1010000000 2
24 42 0010000000 1
35 53 0000000000 a match 0

57 75 0001000001 2
60 06 0000001100 2
71 17 1011000001 4

25 52 0100001001 3 match 3
36 63 0000000100 1 match 4
47 74 0011000000 2 match 5
50 05 0000001000 1 match 6
61 16 0001001001 3 match 7

37 73 1010100000 3
